name: openmark-router
description: Benchmark-driven model routing plugin for OpenClaw, powered by OpenMark AI (https://openmark.ai). Registers as a provider and routes tasks to optimal models using real evaluation data — accuracy, cost, latency, stability — not keyword heuristics or complexity tiers. An isolated LLM classifier selects the task category; deterministic code handles routing math, model forwarding, and routing card injection. The routed model genuinely answers. 5 routing strategies. Direct API providers and OpenRouter.
author: openmarkai
